approved.notes: Broad bioinformatics Q&A. REST API available.

pending.name: Galaxy Help Forum
pending.notes: Public Discourse forum for Galaxy Project users. Researchers ask about data sources, public datasets, and analysis workflows. Accessible via HTTP with JSON API.
pending.rationale: Crawled on 2026-06-12 run; forum was accessible and active (~50+ new topics/week) when all 4 approved forums were blocked (403/timeout). No relevant posts found in this crawl but forum size and topic breadth make it a candidate for future monitoring. GitHub issue: https://github.com/NIAID-Data-Ecosystem/NDE-community-crawler/issues/1
